query:
SELECT l.content_type, l.content_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS "like_count!: i64"
                FROM likes l
                WHERE ($1::text IS NULL OR l.content_type = $1)
                  AND l.created_at >= $2
                GROUP BY l.content_type, l.content_id
                ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, l.content_type ASC, l.content_id ASC
                LIMIT $3
